issue_summary: Filters should return null if they don't accept documents
javadoc_after:
/** * Provide the DocIdSet to be cached, using the DocIdSet provided * by the wrapped Filter.

This implementation returns the given {@link DocIdSet}, * if {@link DocIdSet#isCacheable} returns true, else it copies the * {@link DocIdSetIterator} into a {@link FixedBitSet}. *

Note: This method returns {@linkplain #EMPTY_DOCIDSET} if the given docIdSet * is null or if {@link DocIdSet#iterator()} return null. The empty * instance is use as a placeholder in the cache instead of the null value. */
